seoTitle: How to Automatically Create ClickUp Tasks With n8n
metaDescription: Learn how to connect ClickUp to n8n using an API token and automate creating tasks with titles, due dates, and priority tags.
intro: Automating task creation in ClickUp through n8n saves you from manually entering repetitive to-dos every time a trigger event happens. This guide covers linking your ClickUp API credentials, selecting your workspace and list, and mapping data into new tasks.

steps.heading: Add the ClickUp node
steps.body: Place the ClickUp node onto your workflow canvas where you want tasks to be created.

steps.heading: Connect your API credentials
steps.body: Locate your personal API token in ClickUp settings and add it to n8n's credential manager.

steps.heading: Select your workspace and list
steps.body: Choose the target workspace, space, and list where new tasks should be created.

steps.heading: Map task details
steps.body: Connect incoming data to fields like title, description, due date, and priority.

steps.heading: Test the workflow
steps.body: Run the automation to confirm a task is created correctly inside ClickUp.

faq.question: Where do I find my ClickUp API token?
faq.answer: It's available in your ClickUp account settings, where personal API tokens are generated.

faq.question: Can I assign a task to a specific team member automatically?
faq.answer: Yes, you can map collaborator assignments as part of your automated task payload.

faq.question: Can I set due dates and priority levels through n8n?
faq.answer: Yes, the ClickUp node supports mapping due dates and priority tags when creating tasks.

faq.question: Do I need to choose a specific list for each task?
faq.answer: Yes, you'll select the target workspace, space, and list so ClickUp knows where the task belongs.
